But in a fucking WEIRD turn of events, you’re both Discord quite late tonight, and he’s brought up the proposition of… E-Sex?? I mean… yeah, go for it, a few bounces on it never hurt a brand new, still fresh, still kinda fragile internet friendship, right?

R I G H T?
